import org.apache.hadoop.fs.Path
import java.util.zip.{ZipOutputStream, ZipInputStream, ZipEntry}
import edu.ucr.cs.bdlab.beast.util.ZipUtil

val outPath = new Path(output_dir, "test_stored.zip")
val fs = outPath.getFileSystem(sc.hadoopConfiguration)
val outStream = fs.create(outPath)
val zos = new ZipOutputStream(outStream)

val content = "Hello World".getBytes("UTF-8")
ZipUtil.putStoredFile(zos, "hello.txt", content)
zos.close()

val inStream = fs.open(outPath)
val zis = new ZipInputStream(inStream)
val entry = zis.getNextEntry()
val name = entry.getName()
val method = entry.getMethod()
val size = entry.getSize()
zis.close()

assert(name == "hello.txt", s"Expected hello.txt, got $name")
assert(method == ZipEntry.STORED, s"Expected STORED (${ZipEntry.STORED}), got $method")
assert(size == content.length, s"Expected size ${content.length}, got $size")

println(s"__CHECK__ putStoredFile $name $method $size")

import org.locationtech.jts.geom.Envelope
import org.geotools.referencing.CRS

// Create a known envelope in EPSG:4326 (degrees) to safely test the reprojection API
// without risking out-of-bounds TransformExceptions from unknown RDD coordinate spaces.
val env = new Envelope(-10, 10, -10, 10)
val sourceCRS = CRS.decode("EPSG:4326", true)
val targetCRS = CRS.decode("EPSG:3857", true)

// Execute the target API
val reprojectedEnv = Reprojector.reprojectEnvelope(env, sourceCRS, targetCRS)

// Verify the result is correct: 10 degrees in EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator) should be > 1,110,000 meters
assert(reprojectedEnv.getMinX < -1110000 && reprojectedEnv.getMaxX > 1110000, 
  s"Expected EPSG:3857 X coordinates in the millions for 10 degrees, got: $reprojectedEnv")
assert(reprojectedEnv.getMinY < -1110000 && reprojectedEnv.getMaxY > 1110000, 
  s"Expected EPSG:3857 Y coordinates in the millions for 10 degrees, got: $reprojectedEnv")

println(s"__CHECK__ reprojectEnvelope ${reprojectedEnv.toString}")

import org.locationtech.jts.geom.Envelope
import org.geotools.referencing.CRS
import edu.ucr.cs.bdlab.beast.cg.Reprojector

// Define source (WGS84) and target (Web Mercator) CRSs
val sourceCRS = CRS.decode("EPSG:4326", true)
val targetCRS = CRS.decode("EPSG:3857", true)
val transform = CRS.findMathTransform(sourceCRS, targetCRS, true)

// Create an envelope in EPSG:4326 (degrees)
val env = new Envelope(-10.0, 10.0, -10.0, 10.0)
val originalMinX = env.getMinX

// Reproject the envelope in place
Reprojector.reprojectEnvelopeInPlace(env, transform)

// Verify the envelope was modified and reprojected to Web Mercator (meters)
val reprojectedMinX = env.getMinX
assert(reprojectedMinX < -1000000.0, s"Expected reprojected minX to be in Web Mercator meters (< -1000000), but got $reprojectedMinX")
assert(reprojectedMinX != originalMinX, "Envelope was not modified in place")

println(s"__CHECK__ reprojectEnvelopeInPlace ${env.toString}")
